description: فحص بيئة الجهاز: Python, Chrome, Edge, المكتبات المثبتة
command_preview: Write-Output '=== System Info ==='; python --version 2>&1; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== Chrome Check ==='; if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe') { Write-Output 'Chrome: FOUND' } elseif (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe') { Write-Output 'Chrome (x86): FOUND' } else { Write-Output 'Chrome: NOT FOUND' }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== Edge Check ==='; if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe') { Write-Output 'Edge: FOUND' } else { Write-Output 'Edge: NOT FOUND' }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== Pip Packages ==='; pip list 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'selenium|playwright|requests|beautifulsoup' ; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== Chrome Version ==='; try { (Get-Item 'C:\Pr
